title: Everything is #dirt
description:
'It's all dirt?'
"Always was"
Everything is tagged as dirt, glhf
body:
# Have you ever wanted to plant flowers or trees on any block in the game? No? TOO BAD This datapack literally just puts every single block into the `#dirt` tag, which results in some really messed up world generation and is fascinating to see. > # NOTE > This will affect your world generation, do not put this onto a world you don't want messed up. >
Disclaimer over, have fun
